film.title: Prem Kahani
film.overview: An apolitical poet abandons his love to become a freedom fighter — only for fate to bring them face-to-face again years later.

dialogues.dialogue: You are drunk, Dheeraj! Yes, and a drunken man does not lie like his friend! It's a matter of shame for me......to find out about your love story from the police files! Neither my friend nor my wife told me! This is why I didn't want to stay here.

What have my friend and wife been doing in my own house? That's enough! You're talking nonsense! Insolent man...shameless creature..."Who is it? - The police are here, sir. " Don't you worry, my friend.  Nobody can arrest my friend as yet.

The vermilion on my forehead is no more. But I'm not crying. It's a matter of pride to be the widow of a martyr. Our decision is not to take you in the party. Why not? - Because one sacrifice...is enough for a family.
dialogues.cause_raw: being the widow of a martyr
